mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, actor_id, type, target_type, target_id, title, message, link, is_read, read_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{title}, #{message}, #{link}, #{read}, #{readAt})
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, a.name AS actor_name FROM notification n LEFT JOIN users a ON n.actor_id = a.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
SELECT n.*, a.name AS actor_name FROM notification n LEFT JOIN users a ON n.actor_id = a.id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, actor_id, type, target_type, target_id, title, message, link) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{title}, #{message}, #{link})
